strengths: Diverse technical experience across web, mobile, desktop, and embedded systems with fluency in multiple languages (TypeScript, Node.js, DLang, etc.)
Entrepreneurial and open-source contributions (e.g., GISCollective, Fluent-Asserts) demonstrating initiative and leadership in technical innovation
Hands-on AI/ML exposure via AI-agent infrastructure and MCP (Model Context Protocol) work at re:cinq, aligning with cloud/AI focus
concerns: Lacks a Master's/PhD in an AI-related field, a preferred qualification for the role
No explicit evidence of large-scale AI product/platform ownership or recognized expertise in AI (e.g., patents, publications, or high-impact projects)
Experience is predominantly developer-focused; limited visibility into strategic leadership or director-level IC responsibilities (e.g., advising customers, shaping product roadmaps)
response.justification: Bogdan demonstrates strong technical versatility and entrepreneurial initiative, with relevant exposure to AI-agent infrastructure. However, the role demands deeper AI/cloud expertise and strategic leadership, which are not clearly evidenced in his resume. His experience leans more toward execution than vision-setting or high-impact AI product development, creating a gap for a Principal Engineer position.
